WebSocket handshake endpoint used by dashboard clients.

Query parameters:
- token: JWT access token

Notes:
- Uses HTTP GET upgrade to WebSocket protocol.
- Returns 101 Switching Protocols on successful upgrade.

Comprehensive OpenAPI specification for all backend services in the
Emergency Dispatch System.

Services covered:
- Auth Service
- Incident Service
- Dispatch Service
- Analytics Service
- Realtime Gateway (WebSocket handshake endpoint)
